lane_scope: Declared heater/electrical source that may enter the fluid or wall before losses are applied
runtime_inputs_allowed: setup heater power; declared heater/source distribution; optional admitted train-only heater efficiency; geometry; property lane
forbidden_runtime_inputs: realized CFD heater wallHeatFlux as a predictive runtime input; validation temperatures; CFD mdot; hidden internal Nu correction
outputs: Q_heater_to_fluid; heater efficiency or source split; source residual if present
diagnostic_or_scoring_outputs: CFD imposed duty; realized heater wallHeatFlux; imposed-minus-realized gap; enthalpy residual
current_status: admitted setup-only scalar boundary lane for current predictive work
current_blocker: source distribution and same-time solid/storage audit remain incomplete for stronger physical claims
guardrail: Do not compensate heater-transfer mismatch by changing internal Nu.

lane_scope: Salt-side internal convection and thermal boundary-layer closure only
runtime_inputs_allowed: geometry; Re; Pr; Gz; hydraulic diameter; admitted wall-bulk drive; source-envelope bounded Nu form; solved local fluid state
forbidden_runtime_inputs: external heat residual; passive wall loss; radiation residual; heater or cooler duty error; storage; recirculation/mixing residual; CFD wallHeatFlux as runtime input
outputs: h_internal; Nu_internal; R_internal_convection; thermal entrance/development flag
diagnostic_or_scoring_outputs: postprocessed h and Nu from CFD wall and bulk fields; section-effective labels where recirculation or stratification is large
current_status: not fit-admitted; baseline/reference or diagnostic only
current_blocker: 0 fit-admissible internal-Nu rows; sign/heat-balance recirculation and same-QOI mesh/GCI gates remain open
source_contracts: CFD-13 enthalpy_bulk_temperature; CFD-14 wall_heat_transfer; MF-01 gated_single_stream_developing_branch
guardrail: Heat residual may not be hidden in internal Nu.

lane_scope: Pipe wall or solid wall conduction between inner and outer surfaces
runtime_inputs_allowed: wall material; inner/outer radii or thickness; k_wall; area/perimeter; solved wall or coupled wall state
forbidden_runtime_inputs: fit multiplier that absorbs external convection/radiation/storage; realized CFD wallHeatFlux as runtime input; validation wall temperatures
outputs: R_wall_conduction; inner/outer wall temperature relation; wall heat-rate contribution
diagnostic_or_scoring_outputs: CFD wall temperature and wallHeatFlux comparisons; wall-drive candidate errors
current_status: partial and diagnostic for most segments
current_blocker: segment-local wall material ownership and coupled validation still incomplete; wall-circuit candidates failed validation/holdout gates
source_contracts: CFD-14 wall_heat_transfer; CFD-15 heat_loss_network_terms; fluid+walls wall circuit
guardrail: Keep wall conduction as a resistance lane distinct from internal convection.

lane_scope: Contact gaps local layers coatings and imperfect thermal interfaces where documented
runtime_inputs_allowed: declared contact/layer resistance; layer thickness; k_layer; area; setup patch/layer metadata
forbidden_runtime_inputs: back-solving a contact resistance from held-out heat residual; collapsing contact resistance into Nu; validation temperatures
outputs: R_contact_or_layer; layer temperature drop if modeled
diagnostic_or_scoring_outputs: layer metadata from boundary dictionaries; residual after known wall/external terms
current_blocker: contact/local layer ownership is not yet isolated by segment or independently validated
source_contracts: CFD-15 heat_loss_network_terms; external BC dictionary TODO
guardrail: Use contact/layer terms only when the layer is a setup field or admitted trained parameter.

lane_scope: Insulated steel regions and bare-quartz test-section exterior path
runtime_inputs_allowed: insulation thickness; k_insulation; quartz thickness; k_quartz; exposed area; drive-temperature selector; Ta/Tsur/emissivity/h if external path is included
forbidden_runtime_inputs: realized test-section wallHeatFlux; validation/holdout temperatures; legacy 37 W source as passive loss; residual fitted into Nu
outputs: R_insulation; R_quartz_external; Q_test_section_net; heat-loss sign for quartz/test-section
diagnostic_or_scoring_outputs: test-section realized loss; setup candidate heat errors; material stack atlas
current_status: quartz/test-section material exists but passive-loss candidate is not admitted
current_blocker: predictive-wall-test-section-submodels remains open; setup-only physical candidates fail validation/holdout heat gates or lack accepted coupled score
source_contracts: CFD-15 heat_loss_network_terms; MF-01 branch thermal precheck; fluid+walls test-section balance
guardrail: Test section stays explicit and may be net source or sink; do not delete it or bury it in Nu.

lane_scope: Ambient external convection on passive walls heater exterior junctions and test-section exterior
runtime_inputs_allowed: h_ext; Ta; exposed area; drive-temperature selector; setup segment/patch role; coverage factor
forbidden_runtime_inputs: CFD realized wallHeatFlux as predictive runtime input; validation temperatures; hidden residual multiplier; separate radiation added during wallHeatFlux replay
diagnostic_or_scoring_outputs: patchwise passive wallHeatFlux; external boundary dictionary values; segment heat-ledger comparison

lane_scope: Surface-to-surroundings radiative exchange on rcExternalTemperature or predictive external boundaries
runtime_inputs_allowed: predictive mode: emissivity; Tsur; area; surface temperature from solve; view-factor assumption if admitted; replay mode: no extra radiation term when using realized wallHeatFlux
forbidden_runtime_inputs: adding radiation on top of CFD realized wallHeatFlux; claiming radiation absent; fitting radiation residual into Nu; using qr when no qr field exists
outputs: Q_radiation or h_rad when modeled separately in predictive mode; radiation_on/off sensitivity label
diagnostic_or_scoring_outputs: emissivity/Tsur metadata; OF13 microcase wallHeatFlux deltas; no separate qr output status

current_blocker: TODO-1D-RADIATION-CAPABILITY open; current CFD has no exported separate qr heat term
guardrail: Do not double count radiation; do not absorb radiative mismatch into Nu.

lane_scope: Active cooler HX or jacket removal distinct from passive ambient losses
runtime_inputs_allowed: setup cooler/HX geometry; coolant/air inlet conditions; UA or effectiveness-NTU candidate admitted from allowed training rows; property lane
forbidden_runtime_inputs: imposed CFD cooler duty as predictive runtime input; realized cooler wallHeatFlux for prediction; internal Nu correction to hide cooler error; validation temperatures
outputs: Q_cooler_removed; cooler UA/effectiveness; cooler residual if scored
diagnostic_or_scoring_outputs: CFD imposed and realized cooler duty; cooler scorecard validation/holdout errors
current_status: admitted setup-only cooler/HX candidate for current predictive boundary submodel
current_blocker: broader distributed/coupled review continues but current scalar setup-only lane passes its gate
guardrail: Cooler/jacket removal is an active sink lane, not a passive wall loss and not Nu.

lane_scope: Wall solid and fluid transient heat capacity or non-steady accumulation
runtime_inputs_allowed: steady model: none; future transient model: rho_cp_volume; wall temperature time derivative; time-window metadata
forbidden_runtime_inputs: using storage to tune steady fit without transient evidence; erasing storage residual via Nu; unlogged time-window drift
outputs: Q_storage or dE_wall_dt only in future transient/ROM lane; steady storage flag
diagnostic_or_scoring_outputs: heater imposed-minus-realized gaps and heat-balance residuals that may include storage
current_status: not in present steady fluid+walls runtime model
current_blocker: steady thesis scope excludes wall storage; same-time solid-energy audit and transient model not admitted
guardrail: Storage remains an explicit residual owner or future lane, never an internal Nu fit.
